phrases.text_local: Podes indicar onde fica o acesso à subida da torre da Sé de Évora?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW uh-SEH-soo AH soo-BEE-duh DUH TAW-rih DUH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh?

likely_response.local: O acesso à subida da torre é pela Sé de Évora; pergunte ao bilheteiro ou ao guia oficial no local.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW uh-SEH-soo AH soo-BEE-duh DUH TAW-rih EH PEH-luh SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh; peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo OHW OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL NOO loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The access to the tower climb is through the Évora Cathedral; ask the ticket seller or the official guide on site.

responses.english: The access to the tower climb is through the Évora Cathedral; ask the ticket seller or the official guide on site.
responses.phonetic: AW uh-SEH-soo AH soo-BEE-duh DUH TAW-rih EH PEH-luh SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh; peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo OHW OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL NOO loo-KAHL.
responses.local: O acesso à subida da torre é pela Sé de Évora; pergunte ao bilheteiro ou ao guia oficial no local.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Templo Romano de Diana?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW TAYMP-loo roo-MAHN-noo DIH DEEAHN-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Templo Romano a partir da Praça do Giraldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TAYMP-loo roo-MAHN-noo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Temple from Giraldo Square.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Temple from Giraldo Square.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TAYMP-loo roo-MAHN-noo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Templo Romano a partir da Praça do Giraldo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where São Francisco Church is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a Igreja de São Francisco?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-djee FI-ka eh-zah-tah-MEN-chee ah-ee-GREH-zhah dji SAH-own fran-SIS-koo
phrases.cultural_note: Famous for the Capela dos Ossos inside.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Misericórdia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH mee-zih-ree-KAW-ruhd-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is on Rua da Misericórdia.

responses.english: Good morning, it is on Rua da Misericórdia.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH mee-zih-ree-KAW-ruhd-yuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Misericórdia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Temple of Diana is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde está o Templo Romano de Diana?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dee in-dee-KAR ON-dee-es-TAH oo TEM-ploo roh-MAH-noo deh-dee-AH-nah?
phrases.cultural_note: Only columns remain, symbol of the city.

likely_response.local: Fica no Largo do Conde de Vila Flor, em Évora.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DOO KOHNG-dih DIH VEE-luh FLOHR, AYNG EH-voo-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: It is located at Largo do Conde de Vila Flor, in Évora.

responses.english: It is located at Largo do Conde de Vila Flor, in Évora.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DOO KOHNG-dih DIH VEE-luh FLOHR, AYNG EH-voo-ruh.
responses.local: Fica no Largo do Conde de Vila Flor, em Évora.

phrases.text_local: Pode sugerir um restaurante típico português?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih soo-zhih-REER OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo poo-ruh-too-GEHSH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na Pousada ou no balcão de informações do Turismo para recomendações atuais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH poow-ZAH-duh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO too-REEZH-moo PUH-ruh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH uh-TOOEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the Pousada or the tourist information desk for current recommendations.

responses.english: Ask at the Pousada or the tourist information desk for current recommendations.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH poow-ZAH-duh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO too-REEZH-moo PUH-ruh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH uh-TOOEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte na Pousada ou no balcão de informações do Turismo para recomendações atuais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o início da subida à torre da Sé de Évora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW ee-NEES-yoo DUH soo-BEE-duh AH TAW-rih DUH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira da Sé de Évora para obter informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office of the Cathedral of Évora for information.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office of the Cathedral of Évora for information.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira da Sé de Évora para obter informações.

phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh?

phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH-ee-GREY-jah jee SAH-ong fran-SEE-koo

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Praça do Giraldo is the main square in Évora's historic centre, a central meeting point.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça do Giraldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find cork craft shops
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro as lojas de artesanato em cortiça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo UHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too AYNG koo-ruh-TEE-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portugal's main cork producer, traditional crafts.

likely_response.local: Há lojas de artesanato em cortiça no centro histórico. Peça direções ao guia oficial.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LOH-zhuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too AYNG koo-ruh-TEE-suh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo. PEH-suh dee-rih-SOHNYSH OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: There are cork craft shops in the historic center. Ask the official guide for directions.

responses.english: There are cork craft shops in the historic center. Ask the official guide for directions.
responses.phonetic: AH LOH-zhuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too AYNG koo-ruh-TEE-suh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo. PEH-suh dee-rih-SOHNYSH OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where São Francisco Church is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de São Francisco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN frahnng-SEESH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Church of São Francisco is known for its Chapel of Bones inside.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela dos Ossos; a igreja fica ao lado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh; AH eeg-REH-zhuh FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Chapel of Bones; the church is next to it.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Chapel of Bones; the church is next to it.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh; AH eeg-REH-zhuh FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo.
